defect: wrong glue/no primer on PVC joints
prompt: Evaluate the procedure sequence and state what must happen before work can continue.
scenario: You are on a commercial construction project governed by building codes, submittals, and third-party inspections. The work under review is Rigid & PVC conduit, part of the Electrical scope. The observed field condition is: wrong glue/no primer on PVC joints. The work is actively in progress. Reference material on hand: NEC Art. 344, 352.
title: Sequence check: Rigid & PVC conduit (commercial project)
